TAP SIDES TO NAVIGATE
1 / 3

Property Detail

The exterior facade features a combination of brick and vertical siding. The roof has asphalt shingles with two front-facing gabled dormers and a larger front-facing gable over the entrance. A covered front porch is supported by columns with stone bases. The house includes an attached two-car garage with sectional doors. The driveway is paved with stone pavers. A grass lawn and shrubbery are located at the front of the property. The front door is paneled with vertical sidelights. The windows include grid patterns, with a single arched window centered in the upper front gable.

2 / 3

Property Detail

The exterior features a brick facade with a covered front porch and concrete flooring. The entry consists of a dark-toned door with a glass sidelight insert. Two windows with white muntins are set into the brick wall above a stone sill. A light fixture is mounted beside the entrance, and the underside of the porch roof is finished with horizontal paneling.

3 / 3

Property Detail

The entry features a white panel door with flanking sidelights containing glass inserts. The floor in the foyer consists of rectangular tile, transitioning to wood flooring in the adjacent room. The walls are painted in a neutral tone, with white baseboards and white door casing. A ceiling-mounted light fixture is centered above the entry. An opening with white molding connects the foyer to the adjacent area.
